name: mrubio@marcorubio.com
subject: What am I doing?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | Hi, Peter -- I've got a few minutes to spare before heading out to Nevada today, and just wanted to give you a quick update on what I've been up to. Saturday, I was home in Miami for my sons' football games -- my most important job is being a father and husband. Sunday was more family time. Then on Monday I was off to New York City for a visit to the New York Stock Exchange and media interviews on CNBC and Fox News. Tuesday was an early start with the Today Show, Fox & Friends, and then a speech about the importance of getting Washington out of the way of building a 21st century economy. After all that, it was off to New Hampshire, where we had a great house party Tuesday night, and a couple packed town halls on Wednesday. You can tell it's been a busy week. That's what I signed up for and I know it's worth it. [_**Will you help me out and chip in with a quick donation right now?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44323590:6j0ComLNs:m:1:1349778030:30183AAFE23CD04A50B7119E700D7BBC:r) I'll check back in with my team once I'm out in Nevada and I hope your name is on the list because I can't do it without you, Peter. Thanks! Marco P.S. We're building a great operation up there in New Hampshire, and we won't be able to do that without your support. [_**Can you click here to give right now?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44323590:6j0ComLNs:m:1:1349778030:30183AAFE23CD04A50B7119E700D7BBC:r)
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44323590:6j0ComLNs:m:1:1349778030:30183AAFE23CD04A50B7119E700D7BBC:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Ben Carson
subject: This is my mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30881748:s-RO_XmEN:m:1:876315805:833F8B2E6B1203B4D3A91D7719A52BEF:r)
---

Peter -

I dedicated my life to helping children, and because I retired from medicine doesn't mean that mission is over.

I'm running for President so our children and grandchildren have the opportunity to think big, pursue happiness, and reach their full, God-given potential.

From the beginning, the Washington political class has said only someone with decades of "political experience" can be elected President.

I believe differently. So did our Founding Fathers. And now that I am leading in the polls, the American people do as well.

My campaign is built for the long haul -- and I intend to win. We've received over 620,000 small grassroots donations from everyday, hardworking Americans, helping us to raise an astounding $21 million in the 3rd fundraising quarter. For a grassroots, outsider campaign this is an amazing feat, but we must keep moving forward.

**[Now that we've begun the 4th fundraising quarter, I ask you to join us by donating $4.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30881748:s-RO_XmEN:m:1:876315805:833F8B2E6B1203B4D3A91D7719A52BEF:r)**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30881748:s-RO_XmEN:m:1:876315805:833F8B2E6B1203B4D3A91D7719A52BEF:r)
---
I didn't get into this race to lick the boots of billionaires. The only special interest group I'm interested in representing is "We the People."

As your President, I will secure the borders and enforce our laws. I will call our enemy by its name -- radical Islam -- and protect the American people. I will institute a flat tax that is simple and fair and close the special interest loopholes. I will protect religious liberty, because it's what makes America free.

Working together, I believe that our movement of "We the People" can make history and leave the Washington political class scratching their collective heads for years to come.

[**I hope you will decide to join me right now by making a donation of just $4.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30881748:s-RO_XmEN:m:1:876315805:833F8B2E6B1203B4D3A91D7719A52BEF:r)

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30881748:s-RO_XmEN:m:1:876315805:833F8B2E6B1203B4D3A91D7719A52BEF:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30881749:s-RO_XmEN:m:1:876315805:833F8B2E6B1203B4D3A91D7719A52BEF:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30881750:s-RO_XmEN:m:1:876315805:833F8B2E6B1203B4D3A91D7719A52BEF:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30881751:s-RO_XmEN:m:1:876315805:833F8B2E6B1203B4D3A91D7719A52BEF:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30881752:s-RO_XmEN:m:1:876315805:833F8B2E6B1203B4D3A91D7719A52BEF:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30881753:s-RO_XmEN:m:1:876315805:833F8B2E6B1203B4D3A91D7719A52BEF:r)

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Stand with Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Planned Parenthood saves lives. Their work strengthens communities by providing quality, affordable healthcare for millions of women and men. But right now anti-choice legislators are doing everything they can to defund Planned Parenthood -- they even voted yesterday to form a special Congressional committee to investigate the organization.

[**We can 't let Republicans take healthcare away from millions of women and men across the country. Add your name and join our fight to defend Planned Parenthood. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/4437183730573901824/4259863188259995648?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pp)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4437183730573901824/4259863188259995648?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pp)
---

Make no mistake: This is not an unbiased government investigation. It's a political witch hunt for Republicans to hurt Planned Parenthood's reputation by using misleading evidence to invent tales of illegal activities.

Here in Pennsylvania, Pat Toomey says he's a moderate, but I can't think of anything more extreme than trying to take lifesaving medical treatment away from the women and men who need it. And Toomey did more than just vote to defund Planned Parenthood -- _he cosponsored the bill._

Toomey and his Republican friends in Congress continually prioritize their own political messaging above the health and privacy of women. They care more about getting elected than about doing their job and working for their constituents.

[**Add your name and join our fight to defend Planned Parenthood from unwarranted right-wing attacks.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4437183730573901824/4259863188259995648?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pp)

Thank you for your support,

Katie

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4437183730573901824/4331920782297923584?refcode=20151008e&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4437183730573901824/4187805594222067712).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: They said it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, another day, another Hillary Clinton advisor expressing their concern about facing Gov. John Kasich. Check it out:

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30885796:sh0UgXmvN:m:1:958431888:A1744FC8698A8AB9F8ACCD9F7F71DB0F:r)
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30885796:sh0UgXmvN:m:1:958431888:A1744FC8698A8AB9F8ACCD9F7F71DB0F:r)

A new poll is out today that shows Gov. Kasich at an all-time high favorability (62%!!) in THE critical swing state Ohio.

Hillary's team knows that she cannot defeat Gov. Kasich in Ohio, and as a recent poll showed, Gov. Kasich is the ONLY GOP candidate defeating her in New Hampshire.

**We can win this race with your support**.
[Can you chip in right now to help continue our growth?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30885797:sh0UgXmvN:m:1:958431888:A1744FC8698A8AB9F8ACCD9F7F71DB0F:r)

Gov. John Kasich has the strongest team in New Hampshire and is laying the groundwork to win this primary and go on to defeat Hillary. With your support, we can keep growing our grassroots team in the key primary states we'll need to win.
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30885798:sh0UgXmvN:m:1:958431888:A1744FC8698A8AB9F8ACCD9F7F71DB0F:r)
Thank you for all that you're doing to help.

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist

name: Josh Wolf
subject: I don't want to find out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| _"The entire Democratic caucus,**except Florida Rep. Alan Grayson,** supports Ex-Im's renewal"_
\-- _Politico_ , 9/28/15 Friend,

Some people don't play well with others. Alan Grayson is one of those people, hands down.

Alan Grayson has turned his back on all of his Democratic colleagues -- _**and worse, he 's turned his back on American families**_ \-- by refusing to support the Ex-Im Bank. Senator Elizabeth Warren and most Democrats in Congress support the reauthorization of the Ex-Im Bank. Grayson has decided to ally himself with the Tea Party.

The Ex-Im Bank supports the export of American goods and services abroad. It has supported 1.3 million American jobs since 2009. And it's completely self-sustaining. In fact, the Bank actually _generated_ $675 million for American taxpayers in FY 2014 alone.

I'm not sure which special interest ally Grayson is appeasing by withholding his support, but I can tell you this -- it's not in the interest of Florida families.

[**We have to make sure Patrick wins in Florida. Which means we need to get in $35,000 in October to keep our efforts on track. Make a contribution today to help us get closer to that goal.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae214b/738133e4/3a5cdcf7/7f8e61a3/783270828/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151007?refcode=pme151007_m&recurring=true")

If Grayson can't even work with his own party to do something good for Florida families, how exactly does he plan to get ANYTHING done in the Senate?

I don't know exactly -- _but I don 't want to find out._

If you don't either, help make sure Patrick is Florida's next Senator. [**Click here and make a contribution.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae214b/738133e4/3a5cdcf7/7f8e61a3/783270828/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151007?refcode=pme151007_m&recurring=true")

Thank you.

Josh | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae214b/738133e4/3a5cdcf7/7f8e619c/783270828/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae214b/738133e4/3a5cdcf7/7f8e619d/783270828/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

name: Rand Paul
subject: This is more important than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

My campaign is laying the groundwork to surge to the top.

We have an unmatched and growing on-the-ground presence in the early states, with 99 county chairs in Iowa and at least 300 endorsements in New Hampshire, which leads all other presidential candidates in the grassroots race.

Students for Rand is already on 350 campuses in all 50 states -- and my college tour next week in Iowa is planning to rally over 10,000 students to caucus for my campaign.

Energy is sky-high as GOP loyalists and political newcomers alike step forward to "Stand With Rand" and fuel an exploding volunteer base.

**[Will you help my campaign keep up this momentum by chipping in an immediate contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887943:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r)**?

My campaign is built for the long haul, Fellow Conservative. Just last week, thousands and thousands of grassroots patriots just like you helped me blast through last month's End of Quarter fundraising goal and haul in over $500,000 in just a few days.

No other candidate in this race has the campaign infrastructure that you and I have created.

Our movement is built on a strong foundation, made up of hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters just like you all across the country.

The Washington Machine is terrified of us, Fellow Conservative.

They know we're serious about bucking the status quo and derailing the Big Government gravy train once-and-for-all.

And they know I'm going to fight every step of the way to win this race and ensure liberty, limited government and constitutional principles are finally restored in America.

**[So please help me by chipping in your most generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887943:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r)**.

This race could not be more wide open. So every dollar counts.

Every dollar you can give will help me pay for the critical travel bills for the campaign stops, bumper stickers, phone banks, U.S. mail, social media outreach and Internet and TV ads it will take to surge to the top.

**[Any amount you can afford to contribute](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887943:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r)** will be greatly appreciated and will go a long way toward helping my campaign.

Thank you in advance for your continued support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887944:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887945:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887946:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887947:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887943:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887948:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887949:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30887950:s7ZgQ_msN:m:1:879035888:78B10E61D4BECBE13D6964EFA20BD881:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: 500 tickets left to go
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporters,
This campaign is about people coming together and standing up for each other to improve the lives of all Americans, and not just a handful of wealthy campaign contributors.
So when all of the presidential candidates speak at the Iowa Democratic Party's Jefferson-Jackson dinner later this month, I am heartened to know that the crowd will be packed with the people who power our political revolution: working Americans who have had ENOUGH of billionaires and corporations buying our elections.
I've heard that so far supporters have helped us purchase over 1,350 tickets to the event for Iowa students with crushing debt, workers who need a raise, and the volunteers who work daily to help us win. **But we still have about 500 more tickets we can buy for additional supporters who otherwise would never be able to attend an event like this.**
**[Make a contribution towards an Iowa Jefferson-Jackson dinner ticket for one of our supporters and send a message to the national political media about our movement's willingness to stand with each other.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb648/4144016561/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/j-j-dinner?refcode=em151008jj-full")**
**[Donate $10
(1/5 of a ticket)](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb649/4144016561/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/j-j-dinner?&amount=10&refcode=em151008jj-full")**
**[Donate $25
(1/2 of a ticket)](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb676/4144016561/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/j-j-dinner?&amount=25&refcode=em151008jj-full")**
**[Donate $50
(1 ticket)](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb677/4144016561/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/j-j-dinner?&amount=50&refcode=em151008jj-full")**
**[Donate $100
(2 tickets)](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb674/4144016561/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/j-j-dinner?&amount=100&refcode=em151008jj-full")**
**[Donate $250
(5 tickets)](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb675/4144016561/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/j-j-dinner?&amount=250&refcode=em151008jj-full")**
On the night of the Iowa Jefferson-Jackson dinner, we're going to send a powerful message to everyone watching that when we come together, there is nothing that we cannot accomplish. And that includes winning the Iowa Caucus, the Democratic Primary and the White House, and taking back our democracy from the billionaire class.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb648/4144016561/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/j-j-dinner?refcode=em151008jj-full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb672/4144016561/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb673/4144016561/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb670/4144016561/VEsHBQ/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb256d/43f17890/54152013/621fb671/4144016561/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Josh Wolf
subject: BREAKING: Another Tea Party VICTORY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| **" Shock! McCarthy drops from Speaker's race"**
\-- _The Hill_ , 10/8/2015 Friends,

The Tea Party scored a huge victory when they forced Speaker Boehner to resign. **And today, they scored an even BIGGER victory by forcing Boehner 's lieutenant - Kevin McCarthy - out of the running to replace his boss.**

Put simply: **The Tea Party just cleared the way for one of their own to be the next Speaker of the House.**

We can't keep the House out of Tea Party hands. But we CAN do our part to make sure Democrats take back the Senate.

[**If we 're to have any hope of stopping the Tea Party, we NEED Patrick in the Senate. Which means we need to meet our $35,000 October goal. Contribute $5, $10, or more immediately.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2148/738133e4/3a51404a/7f8e9cc2/3214197995/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151008?refcode=pme151008_m&recurring=true")

Patrick is well aware of how to fight the Tea Party. He's the one who beat Tea Party hero Allen West in 2012.

He can do that again in the Senate. But it's up to us to put him there. And with the Tea Party gaining power - failure is not an option.

[**Rush in your contribution right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2148/738133e4/3a51404a/7f8e9cc2/3214197995/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151008?refcode=pme151008_m&recurring=true")

Thanks.

Josh | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2148/738133e4/3a51404a/7f8e9cc3/3214197995/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Team Murphy
subject: ALERT: Speaker Paul Ryan?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| | [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2149/738133e4/3a562432/7f8e9035/4051793507/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151008pm?refcode=pme151008pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
Friend -- **the man that masterminded the "Ryan Plan" to end Medicare as we know it could become the next Speaker of the House.**

If that happens, the BEST way we'll be able to stop the Ryan Plan from becoming law is for Democrats to take back the Senate.

**Patrick is the only person who can turn Florida blue and help Democrats win.** And we have to do our part to help Patrick win.

[**Please -- rush in a contribution of $5 or more to help us reach our $35,000 goal in October. Give what you can right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2149/738133e4/3a562432/7f8e9035/4051793507/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151008pm?refcode=pme151008pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I need you with me before the debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
The first debate is just days away. | Friend --

When I take the stage for the first Democratic debate on Tuesday night, I want to know that you’re by my side.

**[Will you chip in $1 today to become an official Debate Donor?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM3MDcwMzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwOTA2NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This debate marks the beginning of a new phase of this campaign. For the first time, I’ll stand beside my opponents and make my case to the American people for why I should be our next president.

When I step up to my podium, I’ll be thinking of you and every person on this team who’s cheering me on and giving what you can to make this the best campaign possible.

**I hope you’ll give $1 to become an official Debate Donor. I’m so thrilled to have you on my side:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM3MDcwMzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwOTA2NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM3MDcwMzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwOTA2NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjM3MDcwMzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwOTA2NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM3MDcwMzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwOTA2NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM3MDcwMzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwOTA2NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3MDcwMzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwOTA2NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM3MDcwMzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwOTA2NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM3MDcwMzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwOTA2NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM3MDcwMzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwOTA2NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
